
```{r}
# =======================
# PACKAGES
# =======================

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pracma)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(purrr)
library(broom)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# INPUT / OUTPUT
# =======================
file <- "input_files/cell_lines.csv"
out_dir <- "output/growth_assays/cell_lines"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =======================
# READ DATA
# Required columns:
#   Cell_line (or CellLine / cell_line / Cellline / cellline)
#   Experiment
#   Replicate
#   Draxin
#   Hour (or Hr)
#   Count
# =======================
df_raw <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Allow either Hr or Hour
if ("Hr" %in% names(df_raw) && !("Hour" %in% names(df_raw))) {
  df_raw <- df_raw %>% rename(Hour = Hr)
}

# Allow several possible cell line column names
cell_line_candidates <- c("Cell_line", "CellLine", "cell_line", "Cellline", "cellline")
cell_line_col <- cell_line_candidates[cell_line_candidates %in% names(df_raw)][1]

if (length(cell_line_col) == 0 || is.na(cell_line_col)) {
  stop("No cell line column found. Expected one of: Cell_line, CellLine, cell_line, Cellline, cellline")
}

if (cell_line_col != "Cell_line") {
  df_raw <- df_raw %>% rename(Cell_line = all_of(cell_line_col))
}

required_cols <- c("Cell_line", "Experiment", "Replicate", "Draxin", "Hour", "Count")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df_raw))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

# =======================
# CLEAN DATA
# =======================
draxin_order <- c("0", "2", "8", "35", "140")

df <- df_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Cell_line  = str_trim(as.character(Cell_line)),
    Experiment = factor(as.character(Experiment)),
    Replicate  = factor(as.character(Replicate)),
    Draxin     = str_trim(as.character(Draxin)),
    Hour       = as.numeric(Hour),
    Count      = as.numeric(Count)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Cell_line),
    Cell_line != "",
    !is.na(Experiment),
    !is.na(Replicate),
    !is.na(Draxin),
    Draxin != "",
    !is.na(Hour),
    !is.na(Count)
  )

draxin_present <- draxin_order[draxin_order %in% unique(df$Draxin)]
if (length(draxin_present) == 0) {
  draxin_present <- sort(unique(df$Draxin))
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Cell_line = factor(Cell_line),
    Draxin = factor(Draxin, levels = draxin_present)
  )

if (!("0" %in% levels(df$Draxin))) {
  stop("Control level '0' was not found in Draxin column.")
}

write.csv(df, file.path(out_dir, "cleaned_input_data.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# BASIC QC OVERVIEW
# =======================
qc_summary <- list(
  cell_lines = unique(as.character(df$Cell_line)),
  experiments = unique(as.character(df$Experiment)),
  replicates = unique(as.character(df$Replicate)),
  draxin_levels = levels(df$Draxin),
  hours = sort(unique(df$Hour))
)

capture.output(qc_summary, file = file.path(out_dir, "qc_overview.txt"))

df_counts <- df %>%
  count(Cell_line, Experiment, Replicate, Draxin, Hour)

write.csv(df_counts, file.path(out_dir, "data_structure_counts.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# ANALYSIS FUNCTION
# =======================
analyze_one_cell_line <- function(df_cell, cell_name, parent_out_dir) {

  cell_safe <- str_replace_all(as.character(cell_name), "[^A-Za-z0-9_\\-]", "_")
  cell_out <- file.path(parent_out_dir, paste0("cell_line_", cell_safe))
  dir.create(cell_out, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  message("Processing: ", cell_name)

  # -----------------------
  # BASIC QC
  # -----------------------
  dup_check <- df_cell %>%
    count(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin, Hour) %>%
    filter(n > 1)

  write.csv(
    dup_check,
    file.path(cell_out, "duplicate_timepoints_check.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  baseline_check <- df_cell %>%
    group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
    arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    summarise(
      n_timepoints = n(),
      baseline_hr = first(Hour),
      baseline_count = first(Count),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  write.csv(
    baseline_check,
    file.path(cell_out, "baseline_check.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  bad_baseline <- baseline_check %>%
    filter(is.na(baseline_count) | baseline_count <= 0)

  write.csv(
    bad_baseline,
    file.path(cell_out, "bad_baseline_curves.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # -----------------------
  # NORMALIZE TO BASELINE
  # within each Experiment × Replicate × Draxin
  # -----------------------
  df_norm <- df_cell %>%
    group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
    arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      baseline_hr = first(Hour),
      baseline_count = first(Count),
      Count_norm = Count / baseline_count
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(Count_norm),
      is.finite(Count_norm),
      !is.na(baseline_count),
      baseline_count > 0
    )

  write.csv(
    df_norm,
    file.path(cell_out, "normalized_timecourse.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # -----------------------
  # SUMMARY FOR NORMALIZED PLOTTING
  # -----------------------
  df_plot <- df_norm %>%
    group_by(Draxin, Hour) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      mean_norm = mean(Count_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_norm = sd(Count_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
      sem_norm = sd_norm / sqrt(n),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  write.csv(
    df_plot,
    file.path(cell_out, "normalized_timecourse_summary.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # -----------------------
  # PLOT: normalized growth curves
  # -----------------------
  p_norm <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = Hour, y = mean_norm, color = Draxin, group = Draxin)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(ymin = mean_norm - sem_norm, ymax = mean_norm + sem_norm),
      width = 2
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(cell_name, " - normalized growth curves"),
      x = "Time (h)",
      y = "Cell count normalized to baseline",
      color = "Draxin (nM)"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13)

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(cell_out, "normalized_growth_curves_mean_sem.png"),
    plot = p_norm,
    width = 8,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300
  )

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(cell_out, "normalized_growth_curves_mean_sem.pdf"),
    plot = p_norm,
    width = 8,
    height = 5
  )

  # -----------------------
  # SUMMARY FOR RAW PLOTTING
  # -----------------------
  df_plot_raw <- df_cell %>%
    group_by(Draxin, Hour) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      mean_count = mean(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_count = sd(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
      sem_count = sd_count / sqrt(n),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  write.csv(
    df_plot_raw,
    file.path(cell_out, "raw_timecourse_summary.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # -----------------------
  # PLOT: raw growth curves
  # -----------------------
  p_raw <- ggplot(df_plot_raw, aes(x = Hour, y = mean_count, color = Draxin, group = Draxin)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(ymin = mean_count - sem_count, ymax = mean_count + sem_count),
      width = 2
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(cell_name, " - raw growth curves"),
      x = "Time (h)",
      y = "Raw cell count",
      color = "Draxin (nM)"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13)

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(cell_out, "raw_growth_curves_mean_sem.png"),
    plot = p_raw,
    width = 8,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300
  )

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(cell_out, "raw_growth_curves_mean_sem.pdf"),
    plot = p_raw,
    width = 8,
    height = 5
  )

  # -----------------------
  # CALCULATE AUC
  # one AUC per replicate curve
  # -----------------------
  df_auc <- df_norm %>%
    arrange(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin, Hour) %>%
    group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
    summarise(
      baseline_hr = first(baseline_hr),
      n_timepoints = n(),
      AUC_norm = if (n() >= 2) trapz(Hour, Count_norm) else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(AUC_norm))

  write.csv(
    df_auc,
    file.path(cell_out, "auc_normalized_by_replicate.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # -----------------------
  # CALCULATE TREND (SLOPE)
  # -----------------------
  df_slope <- df_norm %>%
    group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
    arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    summarise(
      n_timepoints = n(),
      slope = if (n() >= 2) coef(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))[2] else NA_real_,
      intercept = if (n() >= 2) coef(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))[1] else NA_real_,
      r_squared = if (n() >= 2) summary(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))$r.squared else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(slope))

  write.csv(
    df_slope,
    file.path(cell_out, "trend_slope_by_replicate.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # -----------------------
  # MIXED MODEL: AUC
  # -----------------------
  if (nrow(df_auc) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_auc$Draxin) >= 2) {

    m_auc <- lmer(AUC_norm ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment), data = df_auc)

    anova_auc <- anova(m_auc)
    emm_auc <- emmeans(m_auc, ~ Draxin)
    posthoc_auc <- contrast(
      emm_auc,
      method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
      ref = which(levels(df_auc$Draxin) == "0"),
      adjust = "dunnett"
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(anova_auc),
      file.path(cell_out, "auc_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
      row.names = TRUE
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(emm_auc),
      file.path(cell_out, "auc_emmeans.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(posthoc_auc),
      file.path(cell_out, "auc_draxin_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

  } else {
    message("Skipping AUC mixed model for ", cell_name, ": not enough data.")
  }

  # -----------------------
  # MIXED MODEL: TREND / SLOPE
  # -----------------------
  if (nrow(df_slope) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_slope$Draxin) >= 2) {

    m_slope <- lmer(slope ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment), data = df_slope)

    anova_slope <- anova(m_slope)
    emm_slope <- emmeans(m_slope, ~ Draxin)
    posthoc_slope <- contrast(
      emm_slope,
      method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
      ref = which(levels(df_slope$Draxin) == "0"),
      adjust = "dunnett"
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(anova_slope),
      file.path(cell_out, "slope_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
      row.names = TRUE
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(emm_slope),
      file.path(cell_out, "slope_emmeans.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(posthoc_slope),
      file.path(cell_out, "slope_draxin_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

  } else {
    message("Skipping slope mixed model for ", cell_name, ": not enough data.")
  }

  # -----------------------
  # FULL TIMECOURSE MODEL
  # -----------------------
  if (nrow(df_norm) >= 4 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_norm$Draxin) >= 2) {

    m_time <- lmer(
      Count_norm ~ Hour * Draxin + (1 | Experiment) + (1 | Experiment:Replicate),
      data = df_norm
    )

    anova_time <- anova(m_time)

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(anova_time),
      file.path(cell_out, "timecourse_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
      row.names = TRUE
    )

    emtr <- emtrends(m_time, ~ Draxin, var = "Hour")
    posthoc_trend <- contrast(
      emtr,
      method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
      ref = which(levels(df_norm$Draxin) == "0"),
      adjust = "dunnett"
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(emtr),
      file.path(cell_out, "timecourse_emtrends.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(posthoc_trend),
      file.path(cell_out, "timecourse_trend_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

    emm_time <- emmeans(m_time, ~ Draxin | Hour)
    emm_time_vs_ctrl <- contrast(
      emm_time,
      method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
      ref = which(levels(df_norm$Draxin) == "0"),
      adjust = "BH"
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(emm_time),
      file.path(cell_out, "timecourse_emmeans_by_hour.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(emm_time_vs_ctrl),
      file.path(cell_out, "timecourse_emmeans_by_hour_vs_ctrl_BH.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

  } else {
    message("Skipping full timecourse mixed model for ", cell_name, ": not enough data.")
  }

  # -----------------------
  # TIMEPOINT-SPECIFIC STATS
  # -----------------------
  if (nrow(df_norm) >= 4 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_norm$Draxin) >= 2) {

    m_time_simple <- lmer(
      Count_norm ~ Draxin * Hour + (1 | Experiment) + (1 | Experiment:Replicate),
      data = df_norm
    )

    emm_time_by_hour <- emmeans(m_time_simple, ~ Draxin | Hour)

    contrast_time_vs_ctrl <- contrast(
      emm_time_by_hour,
      method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
      ref = which(levels(df_norm$Draxin) == "0"),
      adjust = "BH"
    )

    results_time <- as.data.frame(contrast_time_vs_ctrl)

    write.csv(
      results_time,
      file.path(cell_out, "timepoint_specific_vs_ctrl_BH.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

    first_sig_time <- results_time %>%
      mutate(
        contrast = as.character(contrast),
        Hour = as.numeric(as.character(Hour)),
        p.value = as.numeric(p.value),
        Draxin_test = str_trim(str_remove(contrast, "\\s*-\\s*0$"))
      ) %>%
      group_by(Draxin_test) %>%
      arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      summarise(
        first_sig_hour = if (any(p.value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) min(Hour[p.value < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
        first_sig_p = if (any(p.value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) p.value[match(first_sig_hour, Hour)] else NA_real_,
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    write.csv(
      first_sig_time,
      file.path(cell_out, "first_significant_timepoint_per_dose.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

  } else {
    message("Skipping timepoint-specific stats for ", cell_name, ": not enough data.")
  }

  # -----------------------
  # ENDPOINT DATASET
  # -----------------------
  df_endpoint <- df_norm %>%
    group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
    filter(Hour == max(Hour)) %>%
    ungroup()

  write.csv(
    df_endpoint,
    file.path(cell_out, "endpoint_last_timepoint_per_curve.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # -----------------------
  # 24 h RAW VALUES
  # normalized to Draxin 0 mean within each experiment
  # -----------------------
  df_24 <- df_cell %>%
    filter(Hour == 24)

  ctrl_24_check <- df_24 %>%
    filter(Draxin == "0") %>%
    group_by(Experiment) %>%
    summarise(
      n_ctrl = n(),
      ctrl_mean_24 = mean(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  write.csv(
    ctrl_24_check,
    file.path(cell_out, "ctrl_24h_check.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  df_24_norm_ctrl <- df_24 %>%
    group_by(Experiment) %>%
    mutate(
      ctrl_mean_24 = mean(Count[Draxin == "0"], na.rm = TRUE),
      Count_24_norm_to_ctrl = Count / ctrl_mean_24
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(ctrl_mean_24),
      is.finite(ctrl_mean_24),
      ctrl_mean_24 > 0,
      is.finite(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl)
    )

  write.csv(
    df_24_norm_ctrl,
    file.path(cell_out, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl_by_experiment.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  df_24_plot <- df_24_norm_ctrl %>%
    group_by(Draxin) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      mean_norm = mean(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_norm = sd(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
      sem_norm = sd_norm / sqrt(n),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  write.csv(
    df_24_plot,
    file.path(cell_out, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl_summary.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  p_24 <- ggplot(df_24_norm_ctrl, aes(x = Draxin, y = Count_24_norm_to_ctrl)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.75) +
    geom_point(
      data = df_24_plot,
      aes(x = Draxin, y = mean_norm),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      size = 3
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(
      data = df_24_plot,
      aes(x = Draxin, ymin = mean_norm - sem_norm, ymax = mean_norm + sem_norm),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      width = 0.2
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(cell_name, " - 24 h raw count normalized to control"),
      x = "Draxin (nM)",
      y = "Cell count at 24 h / control at 24 h"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13)

  ggsave(
    file.path(cell_out, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl.png"),
    p_24,
    width = 8,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(cell_out, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl.pdf"),
    p_24,
    width = 8,
    height = 5
  )

  # -----------------------
  # MIXED MODEL: 24 h DATA
  # -----------------------
  if (nrow(df_24_norm_ctrl) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_24_norm_ctrl$Draxin) >= 2) {

    m_24 <- lmer(
      Count_24_norm_to_ctrl ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment),
      data = df_24_norm_ctrl
    )

    anova_24 <- anova(m_24)
    emm_24 <- emmeans(m_24, ~ Draxin)
    posthoc_24 <- contrast(
      emm_24,
      method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
      ref = which(levels(df_24_norm_ctrl$Draxin) == "0"),
      adjust = "dunnett"
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(anova_24),
      file.path(cell_out, "24h_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
      row.names = TRUE
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(emm_24),
      file.path(cell_out, "24h_emmeans.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

    write.csv(
      as.data.frame(posthoc_24),
      file.path(cell_out, "24h_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )

  } else {
    message("Skipping 24 h mixed model for ", cell_name, ": not enough data.")
  }

  # -----------------------
  # RETURN SMALL SUMMARY
  # -----------------------
  tibble(
    Cell_line = as.character(cell_name),
    n_rows = nrow(df_cell),
    n_experiments = dplyr::n_distinct(df_cell$Experiment),
    n_replicates = nrow(df_cell %>% distinct(Experiment, Replicate)),
    n_draxin = dplyr::n_distinct(df_cell$Draxin)
  )
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# RUN FOR ALL CELL LINES
# =======================
cell_lines <- levels(df$Cell_line)

summary_list <- list()

for (cl in cell_lines) {

  df_cell <- df %>% filter(Cell_line == cl)

  summary_list[[as.character(cl)]] <- analyze_one_cell_line(
    df_cell = df_cell,
    cell_name = cl,
    parent_out_dir = out_dir
  )
}

summary_table <- bind_rows(summary_list)

write.csv(
  summary_table,
  file.path(out_dir, "analysis_summary_by_cell_line.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("Done.\n")
```
